task_name: Tampa City Council – Identify Neighborhood and District Mentions
notes: Exceptional delivery. Agent identified 89 distinct geographic entities across 291 total mentions, covering all expected districts, neighborhoods, specific addresses, and regional references. Organized with executive summary, frequency table, district-based overview, topic cross-reference, chronological index, and caveats. Context snippets are accurate though some speakers are marked unclear due to transcript format. Breadth spans specific street addresses through regional/national references. Minor deduction (0.9 vs 1.0 on context) for unavoidable speaker identification gaps in realtime caption source, but agent was transparent about this limitation.
